entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop susceptible to Fusarium wilt and dry root rot.

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM F. SP. CICERI
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing Fusarium wilt in chickpea, abbreviated as FOC.

entities.name: ACTINOMYCETES
entities.description: A group of bacteria isolated from herbal vermicompost, exhibiting antagonistic potential.

entities.name: HERBAL VERMICOMPOST
entities.description: Organic fertilizer derived from composting using earthworms and herbs, serving as a source of actinomycetes.

entities.name: DUAL-CULTURE ASSAY
entities.description: A laboratory technique used to assess the antagonistic potential of microorganisms.

entities.name: RHIZOCTONIA BATATICOLA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing dry root rot in chickpea and sorghum.

entities.name: DROOT ROOT ROT
entities.description: A disease affecting chickpea and sorghum caused by Rhizoctonia bataticola.

entities.name: SIDEROPHORE
entities.description: A compound produced by actinomycetes that enhances biological control.

entities.name: CELLULASE
entities.description: An enzyme produced by actinomycetes.

entities.name: PROTEASE
entities.description: An enzyme produced by actinomycetes.

entities.name: HYDROCYANIC ACID
entities.description: A compound (HCN) produced by actinomycetes with antagonistic properties.

entities.name: INDOLE ACETIC ACID
entities.description: A plant hormone (IAA) produced by actinomycetes.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: Controlled environment used for plant experiments.

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: Natural environment where crops are grown.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A disease affecting chickpea caused by Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. ciceri.

entities.name: 16S RDNA GENE
entities.description: A gene used for identifying and classifying actinomycete isolates.

entities.name: STREPTOMYCES TSUSIMAENSIS
entities.description: A species of Streptomyces identified from the CAI-24 isolate.

entities.name: STREPTOMYCES CAVISCABIES
entities.description: A species of Streptomyces identified from the CAI-121 isolate.

entities.name: STREPTOMYCES SETONII
entities.description: A species of Streptomyces identified from the CAI-127 isolate.

entities.name: STREPTOMYCES AFRICANUS
entities.description: A species of Streptomyces identified from the KAI-32 isolate.

entities.name: BLAST SEARCHING
entities.description: A bioinformatics tool used for sequence matching.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop susceptible to dry root rot.
